name: Dynamite Chili with Beans
recipeIngredient: 2/3 lb Boneless pork, cut into 1-inch cubes
1/3 lb Beef stew meat, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine Water and Beans in a medium saucepan to form a paste (optional). Bring to boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer until beans are tender, about 1 hour.
3. Heat Oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add Onion, Green Pepper, and Garlic. Sauté until tender.
4. Transfer contents to a Dutch oven and set aside.
5. Add Pork and Beef to the skillet. Brown well.
6. Stir meat into vegetables in the Dutch oven.
7. Add Beans and their liquid along with Tomatoes and seasonings. Mix well.
8. Cover and simmer for 1 hour.
9. Add Wine and cook, uncovered, for an additional 30 minutes.
10. Season with Salt and Pepper as desired. If too liquidy, stir in some of the tortilla flour paste to thicken.
